title: xanthophyllum resupinatum
intro: Xanthophyllum resupinatum, also known as the 'Resupinate Xanthophyllum', is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum resupinatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, with some cultures also using it in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
